page_title: List of Attack on Titan episodes/The Final Season
text:
This is a list of all the episodes from the Attack on Titan anime's fourth and final season.

Episodes

These episodes were aired in split parts. Part 1 from December 7, 2020 to March 29, 2021, Part 2 from January 10, 2022 to April 4, 2022, Part 3 on March 4, 2023, and Part 4 on November 5, 2023 on in Japan. Part 3 and Part 4 are two TV specials that were also released on Japanese streaming services reworked in their , the first batch of which was released on November 5, 2023, and the second on November 19, 2023.
